code: import{useRef,useState,useEffect}from'react';import'./SettingsView.scss';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const SettingsView=_ref=>{let{onClose}=_ref;const[liveFeedEnabled,setLiveFeedEnabled]=useState(true);const settingsRef=useRef(null);const offset=useRef({x:0,y:0});const dragging=useRef(false);const onMouseDown=e=>{const element=settingsRef.current;if(!element)return;dragging.current=true;const rect=element.getBoundingClientRect();offset.current={x:e.clientX-rect.left,y:e.clientY-rect.top};};const onMouseMove=e=>{if(!dragging.current||!settingsRef.current)return;settingsRef.current.style.left=`${e.clientX-offset.current.x}px`;settingsRef.current.style.top=`${e.clientY-offset.current.y}px`;};const onMouseUp=()=>{dragging.current=false;};useEffect(()=>{window.addEventListener('mousemove',onMouseMove);window.addEventListener('mouseup',onMouseUp);return()=>{window.removeEventListener('mousemove',onMouseMove);window.removeEventListener('mouseup',onMouseUp);};},[]);const handleSave=()=>{console.log('Live Feed Enabled:',liveFeedEnabled);onClose();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-view",ref:settingsRef,style:{left:'200px',top:'200px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-header",onMouseDown:onMouseDown,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Settings"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"close-button",onClick:onClose,children:"\u2716"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"setting-option",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Live Feed"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"checkbox",checked:liveFeedEnabled,onChange:e=>setLiveFeedEnabled(e.target.checked)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"settings-footer",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button green",onClick:handleSave,children:"Save"})})]});};
